zh.lifeSummary: Hanniel Bosworth於1590年出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓。他和Abigail Scott至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1683年9月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年93歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bosworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Husbands Bosworth in Leicestershire (Baresworde in Domesday Book) from an Old English personal name, Bār (from bār ‘boar’) + worth ‘enclosure’, and possibly also from Market Bosworth in Leicestershire, so named with an Old English personal name Bōsa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Hanniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Hertfordshire): habitational name from Hanwell in Middlesex or Hanwell in Oxfordshire. The Middlesex placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Hana or Old English hana ‘cock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, while the Oxfordshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hana or Old English hana + weg ‘way, path, road’, later replaced by wella.

variants.name: Haenel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Horst, Manfred.
German (Hänel): from a pet form of the personal name Johann(es) (see John ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Hanniel Bosworth was born in 1590, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Abigail Scott. He died on 25 September 1683, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 93.

ja.lifeSummary: Hanniel Bosworthは1590年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた。彼はAbigail Scottとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1683年9月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hanniel Bosworth(은)는 1590년 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Abigail Scott(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 9월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hanniel Bosworth родился в 1590 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Abigail Scott. Он умер 25 сентября 1683 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 93 лет.
